race.comment: BEFORE ANYONE ELSE (4) resumes today after filling a minor placing at her last appearance at Sunshine Coast over 1000m on January 1. Gets some weight off from the inside alley and looks one of the genuine hopes in this race. SWITCH THE STARS (2) pushed forward from a wide draw last time out and was prominent for a long way before fading to finish eighth over 1000m at Gold Coast. Form prior to that was full of merit and is likely to measure up. HOWDOYOUZOU (3) showed enough in his first preparation to warrant serious consideration for a race of this calibre. Can run a big race while fresh. JEANS (5) has placed over this track and trip and maps nicely for this from gate two. In the mix.
